quality.rationale: 基于牛顿引力势方程与流体运动方程的自洽性分析，需多步假设代入与梯度运算导出矛盾，逻辑链条完整且具有牛顿宇宙学模型的历史物理动机，解答详尽清晰。

origin.question: Problem 19.1. Show that the equations of Newtonian gravity and hydrodynamics do not admit a cosmology which is isotropic, homogeneous, and static (i.e. an unchanging universe filled with a uniform perfect fluid).
origin.answer: Thus, there is no solution to the equations.
origin.solution:
Solution 19.1. The relevant Newtonian equations are$$
abla^{2} \Phi = 4 \pi G ho \quad (	ext {g r a v i t a t i o n a l p o t e n t i a l}) 	ag {1}$$$$\partial ho / \partial t + 
abla \cdot (ho \underline {{v}}) = 0 \quad (	ext {c o n t i n u i t y e q u a t i o n}) 	ag {2}$$$$ rac {\partial \underline {{v}}}{\partial t} + (\underline {{v}} \cdot 
abla) \underline {{v}} = -  rac {
abla p}{ho} - 
abla \Phi \quad 	ext {(e q u a t i o n o f m o t i o n)}. 	ag {3}$$If the universe is static and homogeneous, then $\underline{\mathbf{v}} = 0$ , and $ho$ and $\mathfrak{p}$ are constant in position and time. The solution of Equation (1) is then$$\Phi =  rac {2}{3} \pi G ho (\underline {{r}} \cdot \underline {{r}}) + \underline {{C}} \cdot \underline {{r}} + K$$where $\underline{\mathbf{C}}$ and $\mathbf{K}$ are arbitrary constants of integration and $\underline{\mathbf{r}}$ is the position vector from the (arbitrary) origin. Equation (2) is identically zero. Equation (3), however, is contradictory: the left side vanishes since $\underline{\mathbf{v}} = 0$ ; on the right, $
abla p$ vanishes by homogeneity, but $
abla \Phi$ is not identically zero for any choice of $\underline{\mathbf{C}}$ , $\mathbf{K}$ . Thus, there is no solution to the equations.
